title: Validate RF-originated inbound events reach Meshtastic app surface
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-t2hn.8.2.1 defines and tests the no-hardware CoAP/local inbound source path into Meshtastic FromRadio, but it does not validate real LoRa/RF-originated inbound semantic events or real phone BLE behavior. What needs to be done: on hardware, receive or inject a real RF-originated LICHEN message/status event, verify it is surfaced through the Meshtastic-compatible BLE FromRadio path to a client/app, and record board, firmware commit, RF setup, app/client version, logs, and pass/fail evidence. Acceptance criteria: hardware evidence is attached in Beads notes; failures create exact blocker Beads with logs and reproduction steps.
notes: Blocked for this no-hardware execution loop (2026-07-01): acceptance requires physical hardware, real RF/BLE capture, logic-analyzer/scope evidence, board flashing, or partner-provided physical logs. No local physical radios/boards/phones/captures are available. Leave blocked until hardware/evidence is available; software-only prerequisites should be tracked in separate dependent Beads.
